fields.label: Organization
fields.description: Tenant floor (ADR §3). Denormalized from the branch.

fields.label: Branch
fields.description: Scoping key (FLO-5 contract). The gathering's branch — scoped natively by Frappe User Permissions on Flock Branch (ADR §6.2).

fields.label: Group
fields.description: Registration context — the gathering's originating group. Group-axis hook surface (ADR §6.3); branch-bound to the gathering's group.

fields.label: Gathering
fields.description: The one-time Flock Gathering (event_category = One-time) this registration belongs to (FLO-7 §3.5).

fields.label: Registrant
fields.description: The person. Visitors are Flock Member rows with status = Visitor (login-less). The self-membership column for the group-axis hook (ADR §6.3 edit #4).

fields.label: Registrant Name
fields.description: Denormalized full_name for search/lists (mirrors Flock Attendance Record attendee_ref).

fields.label: Registration Status
fields.description: Registration lifecycle (FLO-7 §3.5): Registered → {Checked-in | Cancelled}, Waitlisted → Registered (capacity frees), terminal Checked-in/No-show/Cancelled.

fields.label: Registered At
fields.description: When the registration row was created (index for branch-scoped reads, FLO-7 §3.5).

fields.label: Registered Via
fields.description: Provenance (FLO-7 §3.5). Self/Leader are the MVP paths ([FLO-62]); Invite/Bulk land with Phase B ([FLO-79]).

fields.label: Checked-in Attendance
fields.description: Bridge to the FLO-6 attendance row when the registrant attends (FLO-7 §5 #5). Nullable until check-in.

fields.label: Invite
fields.description: If registered via an invitation (Phase B, FLO-7 §3.6). Nullable for the MVP Self/Leader paths.
